title: DTDC Global Group is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: DTDC Global Group is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Join the DTDC Global Group family as a E-commerce Executive in Faridabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About DTDC Global Group:
DTDC Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DTDC Global Group!
